Notice Of Motion To Compel Pltf'S Deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $5,520 Against Pltf And Pltf'S Counsel
Off Calendar Jul-15-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT INTER-CONTINENTAL HOTELS OF SAN FRANCISCO, INCORPORATED'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $5,520 Against Plaintiff And Plaintiff'S Counsel - Counsel must meet and confer to arrange dates and back-up dates for Plaintiff's deposition sufficient that it can be completed by 8/15/11 with sessions of no more than 4 hours per day. The court did not award sanctions. The parties may not file documents under seal except in compliance with CRC 2.550 and 2.551. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported = (301/PJB)
